title: Login and reach dashboard
description: Verify login flow with real credentials and dashboard landing

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field labeled 'ID de Empresa' with the value b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field labeled 'Email' with the value prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field labeled 'Contraseña' with the value PrdTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Verify the page contains the text 'Dashboard'

title: Login with wrong password shows error
description: Verify that invalid credentials show error toast and stay on login page

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field labeled 'ID de Empresa' with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field labeled 'Email' with prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field labeled 'Contraseña' with wrongpassword123
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait 3 seconds, then verify the URL still contains /login
Verify an error message or toast notification is visible on the page containing text like 'error', 'incorrecta', or 'inválido'

title: Login with empty fields shows validation
description: Submit login form with empty fields and verify validation messages appear

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión' without filling any fields
Verify the URL still contains /login
Verify that validation messages or red borders appear on the empty input fields

title: Register new company and land on dashboard
description: Register a brand new company with all fields and verify redirect to dashboard or welcome

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/register
Find the input field labeled 'RUC' and fill it with 20666777882
Find the input field labeled 'Razón Social' and fill it with FrontTest PRD SAC
Find the input field labeled 'Nombre Comercial' and fill it with FrontTest PRD
Find the input field labeled 'Dirección' and fill it with Av Frontend 456, Lima
Find the input field labeled 'Nombre Completo' and fill it with Frontend Tester
Find the input field labeled 'Email' and fill it with frontprd@test.pe
Find the input field for password (labeled 'Contraseña') and fill it with FrontPrd2026!
Click the button with text 'Registrarse' or 'Crear Cuenta'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard or /welcome

title: Unauthenticated redirect to login
description: Accessing a protected route without auth redirects to login

steps.description: Navigate directly to http://localhost:3000/dashboard without logging in first (fresh browser, no cookies)
Wait up to 5 seconds. Verify the URL contains /login, confirming the user was redirected to the login page

title: Dashboard shows KPI cards charts and recent data
description: Verify dashboard loads with KPI cards, charts, and recent activity after login

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field with prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field with PrdTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Wait 3 seconds for dashboard data to load from the API
Verify the page contains at least 4 card elements (with data-slot='card' or class containing 'card') showing numeric KPI values
Verify the page contains at least one SVG element with class containing 'recharts' which indicates a chart is rendered
Verify the page contains text 'Hoy' or 'Este Mes' indicating KPI time periods

title: Emit Factura with multiple items and verify detail
description: Create a new Factura with 3 items, verify IGV calculation and detail page

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field with prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field with PrdTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/documents/new
Wait 2 seconds for the form to load
In the document type select, choose the option containing 'Factura' or '01'
Wait 1 second for the series dropdown to update, then select the first available series option (should be F001)
Find the input for customer document type and select '6' (RUC) if not already selected
Find the input field for customer document number (labeled 'Número' or 'Nro. Documento' or 'RUC') and fill it with 20100070970
Find the input field for customer name (labeled 'Nombre / Razón Social' or 'Razón Social') and fill it with TestSprite Cliente SAC
In the items section, find the first row. Fill the description field with Servicio de consultoría TI
In the first item row, set quantity to 2
In the first item row, set unit price to 500
Click the button to add another item (text 'Agregar Item' or '+' icon below items)
In the second item row, fill description with Licencia de software anual
In the second item row, set quantity to 1
In the second item row, set unit price to 1200
Click the button to add a third item
In the third item row, fill description with Capacitación técnica
In the third item row, set quantity to 3
In the third item row, set unit price to 150
Verify the totals section shows Subtotal, IGV, and Total values. Total should be approximately S/ 3,068.00
Click the button with text 'Emitir Comprobante' or 'Emitir'
Wait up to 15 seconds. Verify the URL changes to contain /documents/ (the detail page) and the page shows a document number starting with F001-
Verify the detail page shows status badge (Accepted, Signed, or Sent)
Verify buttons 'PDF' and 'XML' or 'Descargar PDF' and 'Descargar XML' are visible

title: Emit Boleta with DNI customer
description: Create a Boleta for a natural person with DNI

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field with prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field with PrdTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/documents/new
Wait 2 seconds for the form to load
In the document type select, choose the option containing 'Boleta' or '03'
Wait 1 second, then select the first available Boleta series (should be B001)
Select customer document type '1' (DNI)
Fill customer document number with 71234567
Fill customer name with Juan Pérez López
In the first item row, fill description with Producto retail
Set quantity to 3 and unit price to 50
Click 'Emitir Comprobante'
Wait up to 15 seconds. Verify URL changes to /documents/ detail and page shows B001- number

title: Documents list with filters and pagination
description: Browse document list, apply type and status filters, paginate

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field with prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field with PrdTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/documents
Wait 3 seconds for the documents table to load
Verify a table with rows is displayed (at least 1 row in tbody)
Find the select dropdown labeled 'Tipo' and select 'Factura' option
Wait 2 seconds for filtered results to load
Verify all visible document rows show type 'Factura' or '01'
Find the select dropdown labeled 'Estado' and select 'Aceptado' or 'Accepted' option
Wait 2 seconds
Verify filtered results show only accepted documents
Click the first row in the table body to open document detail
Wait up to 5 seconds for the URL to change to /documents/{id}

title: Document detail view with PDF and XML download buttons
description: Open a document detail, verify all info, and check download buttons exist

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field with prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field with PrdTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/documents
Wait 3 seconds then click the first row in the table body
Verify the detail page shows a document number (text matching pattern F001- or B001-)
Verify the page shows customer name and RUC/DNI information
Verify the page shows an items table with at least 1 row showing description, quantity, price
Verify the page shows Subtotal, IGV, and Total amounts
Verify a button or link with text containing 'PDF' exists
Verify a button or link with text containing 'XML' exists
Verify a status badge is visible (Aceptado, Firmado, or similar)

title: Create Guía de Remisión transporte público
description: Fill the GRE form with public transport carrier and verify creation

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field with prdtest@test.pe

Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/despatch-advices/new or click 'Nueva Guía' button from the despatch-advices list
Wait 2 seconds for the form to load
Select serie T001 from the series dropdown
Select transport mode 'Público' or '01'
Fill transfer reason with '01 - Venta' or select from dropdown
Fill gross weight with 150.5
Fill total packages with 3
Fill carrier RUC with 20123456789
Fill carrier name with Transportes Perú SAC
Fill recipient RUC with 20100070970
Fill recipient name with Destinatario SAC
Fill origin address with Av. Origen 100, Lima
Fill origin ubigeo with 150101
Fill destination address with Calle Destino 200, Arequipa
Fill destination ubigeo with 040101
Add an item: description 'Caja de productos', quantity 10, unit NIU
Click the submit button ('Crear Guía' or 'Guardar')
Wait up to 10 seconds. Verify success — either URL changes to detail page or success toast appears

Wait up to 10 seconds for URL to contain /backoffice
Click the sidebar link with text 'Tenants' or 'Empresas'
Wait 3 seconds and verify a table with tenant rows is displayed
Verify the table shows columns for RUC, Razón Social, Estado, Plan
Click the first row in the tenants table to open tenant detail
Wait 3 seconds. Verify the detail page shows tenant information: RUC, users list, document stats

title: Backoffice documents search cross-tenant
description: Search documents across all tenants in backoffice

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/backoffice/login
Fill email with superadmin@tukifact.net.pe
Fill password with SuperAdmin2026!
Click login button
Wait up to 10 seconds for URL to contain /backoffice
Click the sidebar link with text 'Documentos' or 'Soporte'
Wait 3 seconds for the documents search page to load
Verify a search input or filter fields are present (RUC, Serie, Correlativo)
Find the RUC search input and type 20100070970
Wait 2 seconds for results
Verify a table with document results is displayed showing documents from that tenant

title: Dark mode toggle works
description: Toggle dark mode and verify theme changes

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field with prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field with PrdTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Find and click the theme toggle button (sun/moon icon, usually in the header or sidebar)
Wait 1 second. Verify the HTML element or body has class 'dark' or data-theme='dark'
Click the theme toggle button again
Wait 1 second. Verify dark class is removed

title: Responsive sidebar collapses on mobile
description: Verify sidebar behavior on mobile viewport

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572
Fill the second input field with prdtest@test.pe
Fill the third input field with PrdTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Resize the browser viewport to 375x812 (mobile)
Verify the sidebar is hidden or collapsed (not visible on screen)
Find and click the hamburger menu button (three lines icon) to open mobile sidebar
Verify the sidebar overlay or drawer appears with navigation links
